summary:
Given an array of distinct positive integers (candidates) and a target value, find every unique combination of candidates that sums exactly to the target.

The same candidate may be reused any number of times within a combination. Two combinations are considered the same if they contain the same numbers regardless of order, so each distinct multiset should appear only once.
constraints: All elements of candidates are distinct
Each candidate may be chosen an unlimited number of times
Combinations may be returned in any order
